title: Saved deliberations
subtitle: All dossiers live only on this device. Export them as JSON whenever you wish; import them on another device when you want.
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this dossier? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No deliberations saved yet.
empty.body: When you finish your first deliberation, its dossier will appear in this list. It is not sent to a server, not shared with anyone — it stays on your device.
